question: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
expected_answer:
When you want to understand something that is hard to know, you must take it one small step at a time. You cannot look at the whole thing at once because it is too big and too heavy for your mind to carry. Instead, you must break the big thing into many tiny things. You look at the first tiny thing and try to see it well. Then you look at the next tiny thing. You do this until you have looked at all the tiny things. This way, you do not get lost in the big thing.

The hard question is this. How do we know if the way we are thinking is good or bad? How do we know if we are moving in the right way or if we are just moving in circles? If we break a big thing into small things, we might still be wrong about the small things. If the small things are wrong, then the whole thing will be wrong when we put it back together.

Some people say that the best way is to look for what is true in every small thing. They say you must find things that cannot be taken away. They want to find a bottom part that is strong and will not move. They think if they build their thoughts on these strong things, the whole house of thought will stay up. They believe that if you are very careful with each small part, the whole thing must be right.

Other people say that we can never be sure about the small things. They say that everything we think might be wrong in some way. These people think it is better to look at how the small things work together to make a whole. They do not care if one small thing is not true in every single way. They care if the way the small things act makes sense for the whole thing. They look at how things move and change. They believe that if the whole thing works well in the world, then the way we thought about it is good enough.

question: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
expected_answer:
When you know something, it is a part of you. You might think that giving all your thoughts and all your ways of doing things to everyone is a good thing. You might think that if everyone knows everything, the whole world will be better. But there are many reasons why this is not always the best way to act.

First, think about how people use what they know. Some people are good, but some people are not. If you give a way to make something that can do very much to someone who wants to hurt others, you have made a bad thing happen. You cannot know for sure how another person will use your thoughts. If you keep some things to yourself, you can make sure those things are only used to help.

Second, think about how much work it takes to learn something. It takes a long time to learn a hard way to do a thing. If you give that way away too fast, people might not think it is a big thing. They might not see how hard it was to find. Also, if everyone knows the way, no one will feel the need to work hard to find a new way. New ideas come when people try to find an answer to a problem that no one else has found an answer to yet. If the answer is already out there for everyone, the search for new ways might stop.

Third, think about how your own mind works. When you have a thought that is only for you, you can work on it. You can make it better and more able to do things. If you give it away before it is ready, it might be a thought that has no power. It might be a thought that has things in it that are not right. If you wait until you are sure it is good, you can share it with much more power.

Finally, there is the matter of how we live with each other. In a group of people, we often have things that are special to us. These things make us who we are. If we give everything away, we might lose the things that make us different and special. Having some things that belong only to you allows you to have a place that is your own. This helps you stay strong as a person. Because of this, being careful about what you share is a way to be someone who thinks well and to keep the world a good place.

question: why some deals hold together and others fall apart
expected_answer: First, we must look at what happens when two or more people agree to do something together. We can call this a way of working together to get something they both want. To see why some of these ways of working together stay strong and others break, we must look at what makes them work. First, we look at what each person gets from the work. If one person gets a lot and the other gets very little, the one who gets very little might feel it is not good to keep going. This can lead to them leaving or not doing what they said they would do. Second, we must look at what each person thinks the other person will do. If a person thinks the other person will not do their part, they will stop doing their part too. This is a bad way to work because it makes the whole thing break. Third, we look at how much it would hurt someone to stop the work. If it is very hard to stop, then people will stay even if things are not great. If it is very easy to stop, then the work might end very fast. The thing after the third thing, we look at how much people trust each other. Trust is the feeling that the other person will do what they said they would do. Without this feeling, the work cannot stay together for a long time. Finally, we look at how much the people need each other. If one person can do everything alone, they have no reason to stay with the other. If they must have the other to get what they want, they will try harder to make the work stay strong. This tells us that for a way of working together to stay strong, it must be such that both sides get what is right for them, it must be built on trust, and both sides must need the other to get what they want.

question: why who someone is to you changes what you should do for them
expected_answer:
When you think about what you should do for another person, you are trying to find the right way to act. You might ask yourself if you should help them or give them something. The answer to that question is not the same for every person. It changes because the way you see that person changes.

First, we must look at how people are different to each other. Some people are far away from you and you do not know them at all. You might see them on the street once. They are just another person in the world. Because you do not know them, you do not have a special tie with them. Your job to them is small. You might help them if they fall down, but you do not have to give them your whole life or all your money.

Second, we look at people who are closer to you. These are people like your mother, your father, or your children. You have a very strong tie with these people. You have spent much time with them. You care about their feeling of being good as much as your own. Because they are so close to you, the thing you should do for them is much bigger. If your child wants food because their stomach feels bad, you will give them your food before you give food to a stranger. This is because the person is special to you.

Third, we look at people who are in the middle. These are friends or people you work with. You know them, but they are not your family. Your job to them is more than to a stranger, but less than to your family. You might help a friend move their things, but you might not give them your house.

The reason this happens is because of how we feel and how we live. We are not just machines that act toward every person in the same way. We are living things that build ties. These ties make some people more important to us than others. These ties tell us how much we should give. When you decide what to do, you are not just looking at the thing you are doing. You are looking at the person you are doing it for. The place that person has in your life tells you how much you should care. Because of this, the person you are helping changes the way you should act.

question: what it means to live a good life by being a good person
expected_answer:
First, the first idea they tell us is that a life that feels good comes from being a good person. They say that if you try to act kind, right, and tell the truth, then your own days will feel better. They point to the thought that when you give help to others you also get help back, and that this give‑and‑take makes the whole way of your days feel more good.

Second, the second idea they add is that this first thought makes other thoughts follow. They think that because you are a good person you will get love, trust and a calm feeling from the people around you, and that these things will make your life feel safe and happy. They also think that if you act in a way that hurts or lies to others, then you will find yourself hurt, alone or in trouble, so you will not have a good life. They say that the way you do things that people do is like a road that leads you to the kind of days you will have.

Third, the third idea looks at whether the group of thoughts is good. It can be true that many people feel better when they act kind and that many people feel worse when they act mean. It is also true that this give‑and‑take can also change how your days feel. But the thinking that this alone makes a life good can miss other things. Body being well, chance, the place you are born and the ways of the world can also change how your days feel. Sometimes a kind person can be hurt by bad chance, and sometimes a person who does not try to be kind can still have some good days because of chance or help from others. So the thinking is in part because it reminds us to try to be kind, but it is not always enough to say that this alone will make every day feel good. A better way to think is to see the kind things that people do as a strong part of a good life, while also seeing that other parts of the world can help or hurt us, and that we may need to work on those parts too. In that sense the thinking is good, but it should be held with the idea that it is only one part of a bigger view.

First, think of a person who is nice and kind. They may say that the sky is blue. The sky is blue because we can see it that way. The nice way the person acts does not make the sky being blue any more true, and it does not make it any less true. The truth of the sky being blue comes from the sky itself, not from how the person feels.

To see if a point is right, we can look at the thing it talks about and see if it is the same as what we see or what we can check. If it is the same, we can call it right. If it is not the same, we can call it not right. The feeling we have about the person does not change this same.

The next step, we can also see that a person can be good in many ways and still be wrong about a fact, and a person can be bad in many ways and still be right about a fact. The two things are not the same. One is about how the person acts, the other is about the thing they say.

So, when we hear a point, we should not let the way the person acts decide if the point is right. We should look at the point itself, see if it is the same as what we see, and then decide if it is right. The way they act is a different thing that does not decide the truth of the point.

question: the difference between a strong reason and a weak reason
expected_answer:
When a person looks at why they do one thing instead of another, they may feel that one reason feels strong and another reason feels not strong. The strong reason feels like it will really push what happens in one way, while the not strong reason feels like it may not do much at all. The hard question is how we can tell when a reason is strong and when it is not strong. It is not just a feeling, it is a question that can make us think a lot about how we decide what to do.

One way people answer is to ask if the reason has many facts that line up with what we already see. When a reason comes with many facts that line up with other things we know, many people say that makes the reason strong. They think that the more facts we have, the more we can be sure the reason will work the way we think. Others say that a reason can be strong even if it does not have a lot of facts, if it fits well with the big picture of what we already see. For them, the fit with the whole set of things we know is more important than a count of facts.

Another group of people look at how the reason makes us feel safe or safe from hurt. If a reason seems to keep us from hurt, they call it strong. If a reason seems to lead us toward a bad place, they call it not strong. They may also think about what the reason will let us do later. A reason that lets us reach more good things later can be called strong, while a reason that stops us from getting good things can be called not strong.

Still another set of people think about how many other people have used the same reason and seen it work. They look at the number of times the reason has been used and the number of times it has helped. If many people say it helped them, they say the reason is strong. If only a few people say it helped, they say it is not strong. Each of these answers comes from a different way of looking at the world, and each can make sense in its own way. The hard question stays the same: what makes a reason strong or not strong, and why do we feel one way about it and another way about another? The answer may be together of facts, fit with what we know, feeling of being safe, and the stories we hear from others.

question: how to pick the best reason out of many that could be right
expected_answer:
Sometimes you have many different ways to tell why something happened or why something is true. You must find the one way that has the most chance of being the right one. To do this, you should look at each way one by one.

First, look at how much each way needs to be true. If a way to explain something needs many things to happen at the same time, it is probably not the best way. A good way to explain something should not need too many extra things to be true. If you have to believe ten things that you cannot see just to make your way work, then your way is not as good as a way that only needs one thing to be true.

Second, look at how much new stuff your way brings into the world. If you have two ways to explain why the ground is wet, and one way says it rained, while the other way says a big water machine fell from the sky and broke, the first way is better. The second way brings in a big machine that no one saw and no one can show. We should pick the way that does not add too many new things that we cannot see or touch.

Third, look at how well the way fits with what we already know. If a new way to explain something goes against everything we have seen before, we should be very careful. We should only pick that way if it is much, much better than all the other ways.

To find the best way, you take all these things and put them together. You want the way that needs the fewest things to be true, the way that does not add too many new things, and the way that stays close to what we already know is true. When you do this, you find the way that has the most chance of being the truth.

question: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
expected_answer:
You have a set of thoughts in your head about how the world works. These thoughts are like a way of seeing things. When you see something new, you do not see it in a way that is clean and free from what you already know. Instead, you look at the new thing through the way you already think.

First, think about how you see colors. If you think the sky is always blue, you will look at the sky and look for blue. You will not look for other colors because your mind is already set on blue. This is how your thoughts work with new things too.

Second, your mind wants to feel that it is right. It is not a good feeling to think that what you know is wrong. When you see something new that goes against what you believe, your mind tries to change the new thing so it fits with your old thoughts. You might tell yourself that the new thing is not true or that it is not important. This makes you feel safe in your own mind.

Third, your mind looks for things that say you are right. If you believe that all dogs are mean, and you see a new dog, you will look for the mean things in that dog. You might see it make a loud and angry sound and say, I knew it. But if you see the dog being kind, you might say it is only acting that way to make you think something that is not true. You find the things that are the same as your old thoughts and you throw away the things that are not the same.

Because of this, two people can look at the very same thing and see two different things. One person sees a thing that proves they are right, and the other person sees a thing that proves they are right. They are not looking at the thing in a way that is the very same. They are looking at it through the eyes of what they already believe. Your old thoughts act like a window that changes the color of everything you see through it.

question: what it means for a case to be put together well

question: why following rules is not enough if you do not care about people
expected_answer:
Think about a group of people living together in a place. To keep things good, these people make a set of things they must do. These are the ways they must act so that no one gets hurt and everyone can live without fighting. We can call these things the ways things must be done.

If a person only looks at these ways things must be done, they might think they are a good person. They might say, "I did not break any of the ways things must be done, so I am good." But this is not always true.

Imagine a person who sees someone fall down and get hurt. This person looks at the ways things must be done and sees there is no way that says they must help a person who falls. So, this person walks away and does nothing. They did not break any way things must be done, but they did not act with a good heart. They did not care about the person who was hurting.

When we only care about the ways things must be done, we miss the point of why we made them in the first place. We made these ways of acting to help people and to make sure people are seen in a good way. If we follow the ways but do not care about the people, we might find ways to follow the ways while still being mean or not good. We might find ways to follow the ways that actually make things worse for others.

A person who only cares about the ways things must be done is like a machine. A machine can follow a way without feeling anything. But a machine does not know if what it is doing is good or bad for a person. It only knows if it is doing what it was told to do.

To be a person who is very good, a person must do two things. First, they must follow the ways things must be done. Second, and it is a very big thing, they must care about the people around them. They must ask, "Will what I am doing make this person feel good or bad?" and "Will this help or hurt this person?"

If you only do the first thing, you can be a person who does no wrong but also does no good. If you want to make the world a better place, you must have a heart that cares about other people. The ways things must be done are only a starting point. The real thing we want to reach is to act toward people with love and a good heart.

I am right!" But they did not look for the red bird or the green bird. They only looked for what they wanted to find. This makes them feel very sure, but it makes them wrong about all birds.

question: what it means for a case to be put together well
expected_answer:
When a person puts a case together well, they make a story about why something is true that other people can follow and feel right. The first thing they do is pick a clear point that they want to show. This point is the main idea that the whole talk will turn to. 

Next, they look for facts that help the point. Each fact is something that can be seen, heard, or known for sure. They do not just pick any fact; they pick facts that are strong and that really fit the point. They also try to keep the facts simple enough that most people can see them. 

Then they put the facts in an order that makes sense. They may start with a fact that most people already know, then move to a fact that adds a little more, and keep going until they reach a fact that shows the point clearly. When they move from one fact to the next, they make sure the two fit together, like pieces of a thing that join at the sides. They use words that show how one fact follows the other, such as “and then,” “so,” or “because,” so the person can see the path from the start to the end. 

While they are putting the pieces together, they also check that each piece helps the whole. If a piece does not help, they take it out or use another one that is better. This keeps the case from having extra parts that only make it harder to see the point. 

At the end, they give a final part that ties all the earlier parts back to the main point. This final part shows the person why the whole set of facts together means the point is true. It is not a new idea, but a short rest of what has already been shown, so the person can feel the whole story is finished. 

A well put together case also uses words that are clear and not too hard. It avoids words that would hide the meaning or make the person stop and think about the word instead of the idea. It uses short lines and simple words, so most people can stay with the story from start to finish. 

When all of these things happen – a clear main idea, strong facts, a fitting order, each part helping the whole, a final tie back, and simple words – the case feels close, clear, and easy to understand. That is what it means for a case to be put together well.

question: how to decide whose good matters and how much
expected_answer:
When we think about what is good, we often find that we are in a hard spot. We want to do what is right, but we must choose between many things. We must decide who gets the good things and how much each person gets. To do this, we can look at it in a few ways.

First, we can think about all the good in the world put together. In this way, we want to make the most good for everyone. We look at every person and every choice. We ask, which choice makes the most good for the most number of people? If one choice makes ten people feel very good but makes one person feel very bad, and another choice makes one hundred people feel a little bit good, we must look at these things and see which is more. We try to find the path that brings the most good to the world.

Second, we can think about what each person should get. In this way, we do not just look at all the good put together. We look at the person. We ask, what is the right thing to do for this one person? We might say that every person has certain things that should never be taken away. We say that some things are right for everyone, no matter how much good there is. We do not let the good feeling of many people be used to hurt one person. We say that each person has a right to be acted toward in a certain way.

Third, we can look at the things people do. We might say that being a good person means following certain ways of acting. We look at the person and ask, is this what a good person would do? We look at the heart and the way a person lives.

To make a choice, we often use more than one of these ways. We might try to make the most good, but we also stop to make sure we are not being not right to one person. We try to find a way to make all the good and the right way to act toward each single person work well together. It is a hard thing to do because there is no one way to be sure. We must keep thinking and keep asking what is real good for us all.

They think that being able to finish something and move to the next thing is more important than making one thing the very best. question: why some deals hold together and others fall apart
expected_answer:
When two or more people agree to do something together, they make a promise. Sometimes these promises stay strong for a long time. Other times, the promises break and the people stop working together. To know why this happens, we must look at how the people think and how they act.

First, we must look at what each person gets from the promise. If one person gets much more than the other, the person with less may feel that the promise is not good. They might think that it would be better to walk away and do something else. If the things they get are not enough to make them happy, the promise will probably break.

Second, we must look at what happens if someone breaks the promise. If a person can break the promise and get more than they had before, they will probably do it. This is true if they can do it without being made to pay for it. If there is no way to make them pay for breaking their word, they have no reason to keep it. But if they know that breaking the promise will make them lose something important later, they will try to keep it.

Third, we must look at how much the people know. Sometimes, one person knows much more about the thing they are doing than the other person. This can be a problem. The person who knows less might be made to believe something that is not true. If they find out they were made to believe something that is not true, they will stop working with the first person. For a promise to stay strong, both people need to feel that they are seeing the same thing and that no one is hiding something.

The thing after the third thing we must look at is the people themselves. If the people do not trust each other, the promise will be hard to keep. Trust is the feeling that the other person will do what they said they would do. If you think the other person might hurt you or take your things, you will not want to make a promise. Even if the promise looks good on paper, not having trust can make it fall to pieces.

Finally, we must look at what happens in the future. If the people can work together many times, they will try to be good to each other. They know that if they are bad now, they will not have more promises later. But if they will only work together one time, they might try to take as much as they can right now. This is because they do not care about what happens after the first time.

So, a promise stays together when both sides get what they need, when it is hard to break the promise without losing something, when everyone knows the truth, when there is trust, and when the people want to work together many times. If these things are not there, the promise will probably break.

question: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
expected_answer:
When a person feels happy for a short time it is often because something new or exciting has happened. A new gift, a new song, a win in a game, or a laugh with a friend can make a quick happy feeling. This feeling is like a small quick bright feeling. It can go out when the new thing is gone or when other things take its place.  

But a real kind of happy that stays for a long time comes from other things.  

First, having people you care about and who care about you makes a feeling that stays. When you can share time, talk, laugh, and help each other, the happy feeling can grow and stay even when other things change.  

Second, doing things that feel like they have a reason or meaning to you helps the happy feeling stay. When you work on something that matters to you, or when you help a person or a group, you feel that your time is used for a good reason and that can keep the happy feeling for a long time.  

Third, learning new things and seeing yourself get better at something can give a happy feeling that stays. When you see that you can grow, that you can find a way to fix a problem, or that you can make something new, you feel strong inside and that feeling can stay even after the new thing you can do is learned.  

Another big part is taking care of your body. When you get enough sleep, eat food that gives you more good, move your body, and stay safe from hurt, your mind can hold the happy feeling better.  

When these things are together, the happy feeling can stay for a long time and feel real inside. It is not just a quick small quick bright feeling, but a warm light that can stay even when days are hard.

question: why being good at being a person is like being good at anything else
expected_answer:
We see a lot of talk about how a person can try to be a good person. In this talk a person looks at the way they act, the way they feel, and the way they act toward other people. They watch how they change over time and how other people say what they think. This watching and changing feels a lot like the way a person might try to be good at a game or work. The scene is that many people sit and think about why the work of being a good person seems to follow the same steps as the work of being good at any other thing.

The thing that is happening is that a person takes the thing they want, such as “be nice” or “be just”, and then they look at what they do each day. They get the way other people tell them how they did, from themselves, and from the way the world shows a change. They try again, they learn a little, they try again, and they feel a little better when they see that the world seems a bit nicer. All of this looks a lot like the way a person learns to play a game, to draw, or to fix a thing that works. The hard question that comes up is why the work of being a good person should be thought of as the same as the work of being good at any other thing. Is there something special about the feeling part of being a person, or is it just another set of things they do that can be tried, watched, and changed?

One answer that many people give is that being a good person is just a set of things they do that can be seen and tried. They say that being nice, telling truth, and care are things they do that can be done many times like a game move. When a person watches how those things work, they can do the same as them, they can get a feel for when they work, and they can get better with time. This answer rests on the idea that any thing you get good at, whether it is a game move or a caring act, is learned by trying, by the way other people tell them how they did, and by changing what they do.

Another answer that some people share is that being a good person is not only about things they do but also about feelings and other people. They point out that when you care for someone you feel something inside, and that feeling can push you to act in a certain way. Because feelings are part of the way it goes, they think the work of being a good person may need a different kind of care than the work of fixing a thing you use. They say the need to feel safe, to feel loved, or to feel that you belong can make the learning path a bit different, even if the steps of trying and watching are still there.

A third answer comes from those who look at the ideas that big groups of people make. They say that big groups of people make a set of ideas about what it means to be good, and those ideas act like a game with signs and ideas that tell what to do. In that view, being a good person is like playing a game where you try to follow the ideas, get a good feeling, and avoid a bad feeling. Because a game has a clear set of moves and a clear way to see if you do well, they think the work of being good at a person is very much like the work of being good at any other game.

All of these answers try to tell about why the work of being a good person looks a lot like the work of being good at other things. Some say it is because both are sets of things they do we can try and change. Some say it is because feelings add an extra part that makes it a bit special. Some say it is because the ideas we share act like a game. The talk continues as people think about which of these ideas feels the most true and how they might use that thought to keep trying to be a better person, just as they would keep trying to be better at any other thing they care about.

question: why the rules should be the same for everyone
expected_answer:
Imagine a group of people living together in one big place. This place has many ways of telling people how to act so that everyone stays safe and happy. These ways are what we call the things everyone must do. Now, imagine that one person is very strong or has a lot of money. This person might think that they should not have to do the same things as the person who has little power or has no money. They might think that because they are important, the ways of acting should be different for them.

The hard question is this. Should the ways of acting be the very same for every single person, no matter who they are or what they have? Should the person with much power follow the same ways as the person with no power?

Some people say yes, the ways must be the same for everyone. They say that if the ways are not the same, then the ways are not good. They think that if one person can do something that another person cannot, then the whole group will break into pieces. They believe that for a group to stay together, everyone must be under the same power. If the ways change because of who you are, then the ways are just ways to help the strong and hurt those who have little. This makes people feel that the group is not what people call right and they will stop wanting to be part of it.

Other people might say no, the ways should not be the same for everyone. They might say that some people need more help than others. To show what they mean, if a person is very sick, they might need different ways of being cared for than a person who is strong and well. They might say that if we act with everyone in the very same way, we might actually hurt the people who are already having a hard time. They believe that being right means looking at what each person needs to live a good life, not just making everyone do the same thing.

These two ways of thinking are hard to bring together. One way wants to make sure no one is above the group, while the other way wants to make sure everyone gets what they need. People spend a long time thinking about how to find a way to do both.

question: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
expected_answer:
When you know something that can change how things work, you might think that telling everyone is the best thing to do. You might think that if everyone knows the same thing, the whole world will become better and faster. However, there are many reasons why keeping some things to yourself can be a good choice.

First, we must think about how people use what they learn. If you tell someone a way to make things work better, they might use that way to help others. But they might also use it to hurt others or to take things that do not belong to them. If what you know can be used to do bad things, then telling everyone might cause more pain than good.

Second, we must think about how much work it takes to learn something. It takes a long time and a lot of hard work to find out how something works. If you give that work away for nothing, you might not have the power or the money to find out more things later. If people can just take what you know without doing the work themselves, they might stop trying to learn on their own. This could make the whole world stop growing and stop finding new ways to live.

Third, there is the problem of how people act when they get new information. Not everyone will use new information in a good way. Some people might get scared or angry when they learn something new. This can lead to fighting or to people making bad choices because they do not understand the thing you told them.

Finally, we must think about how much a person can hold in their head. If you try to tell everyone every single thing you know, the information can get all together in a way that is not clear. It can become a state where no one knows what is true and what is not. When too much information comes at once, people often stop listening or they start to believe things that are not true.

So, while sharing can be good, you must think carefully. You must look at who will hear you, how they will use it, and if the world is ready to hear it. Sometimes, the best way to help is to wait and to share only with those who can use it to do good.

question: when we have good reason to think a thing will or will not happen
expected_answer:
Sometimes we want to know if a thing will happen in the future. We might want to know if it will rain or if a friend will come to our house. We do not know for sure because we cannot see the future. However, we can look at what is happening now and what has happened before to make a good guess.

First, we look at the things that are happening right now. If the sky is very dark and the air feels heavy and wet, we have a reason to think it will rain soon. These are things we can see and feel. They give us a way to think about what might come next.

Second, we look at what happened in the past. If it has rained every time the sky was dark for the last ten years, we can use that to help us. We see things that happen in the same way over and over. When we see things that happen in the same way over and over, we can say that it is very possible that the same thing will happen again.

When we put these two things together, we have a way to say how much we believe something will happen. If all the things we see point to the same thing, we have a very good reason to believe it. We might say it is almost certain to happen. If the things we see point in different ways, we have a reason that is not strong. We might say it is not sure at all.

We must be careful, though. Just because something happened many times before does not mean it must happen every time. A new thing could come and change everything. We use what we know to make the best guess we can, but we must always remember that our guess is not the same as knowing for sure. We use the things we see and the things we remember to help us move through the world without being surprised all the time.

question: how a story about one person does not tell us about everyone
expected_answer:
When a story talks about one person it only shows what that one person did, felt, saw or thought. It can give us a clear picture of that one life, but it does not give us a picture of all lives. Think of a group of many people as a big crowd. Each person in that crowd has a own home, a own job, a own family, a own way of seeing the world. One person may live in a city, may work with machines, may love music, may feel safe at night. Another person may live far away, may work with things that grow in ground, may love quiet, may feel scared at night. Because the ways that people live can be many and can change, a story about only one of them cannot tell us how the others live.

If we hear only one story we might think that everything in the story is true for all people. That would be like looking at one leaf and saying all trees have that leaf. The truth is that the leaf we see is just one leaf. To know more about the whole forest we would need to hear many stories, each from a different person, and we would need to see how those stories are the same and how they are not the same. When we have many stories we can start to see which parts are the same for many people and which parts are only for a few. That lets us say things like many people feel this way or many people do this way, instead of saying all people feel this way.

So a story about one person is good for learning about that one person, but it is not enough to learn about all people. To learn about all we need many stories, and we need to keep in mind that each story is only a small part of the whole picture. This helps us avoid thinking that one small part tells us about the whole. It also helps us keep an open mind when we meet new people, because we know that each new story may be different from the one we already heard.

question: how a group can agree on rules that are good for everyone
expected_answer:
A group of people wants to live or work together in a way that stays good and gives everyone what they need. To do this, they need to make a set of ways to act. These ways tell people what they can do and what they must not do. If everyone follows these ways, the group can stay together without fighting. But making these ways is very hard.

The hard question is how to find the ways to act that are good for every single person in the group in a way that is not wrong. It is easy to make ways that are good for some people but bad for others. It is also hard to know if a way is good for the whole group or if it only helps the people who have the most power. How do we know if we are being good to the person who has the least?

Some people say the best ways are the ones that make many people feel very good. They think if a way helps many people, even if it hurts a few, it is the right way to go. They look at how much good there is and try to make that number as big as it can be. They think this is the best way to take care of the group.

Other people say this is not right. They say that every person has certain things that should never be taken away. They believe that even if a way makes many people feel very good, it is wrong if it hurts one person in a way that is not right. They think we must have ways that keep every single person safe, no matter what. They think we should not use people just to make the group feel very good.

There is also a way of thinking where people try to make ways that they would agree to if they did not know who they would be in the group. Imagine you do not know if you will be the leader or the person with no money. You do not know if you will be strong or have little power. Most people would pick ways that are safe and right for everyone, because they might end up being the person at the bottom. This is a way to find what is good for all.

expected_answer:
One person might say a good enough act of changing words from one language to another is a thing that keeps the true meaning, follows the ways that words are put together, and uses words that are the same as the first words.  

This idea shows the things we want: the right meaning, easy to read, and close enough.  

But a case that shows it is not enough comes from a well known thing of places where there are no words between languages.  

Think about a word from a language that many people in a part of the world speak that means a special kind of warm feeling, nice feeling, and a feeling of being at home.  

There is no one word in the language that many people in a part of the world speak that is the same as it.  

A good enough act of changing words from one language to another for a set of words that has that word has to use many words or a different way of saying – maybe “a warm and nice feeling” – but no one word in the language that many people in a part of the world speak is the same as that word.  

The one after the second way, which needs words that are the same, does not happen.  

Still the many word act of changing words from one language to another can be good enough: it keeps the true meaning, it follows the ways that words are put together, and it gives the idea of the first set of words with close enough.  

The idea, by saying we must have words that are the same, makes a part that cannot happen when languages cut the world in not the same ways with their words at the part.  

What we need is a less hard part – maybe that the act of changing words from one language to another just gives the idea of the first set of words using any words we have, without needing each word to have the same word.

question: counterexample to: A function f from the real numbers to the real numbers is continuous at a point
expected_answer:
Think about three things that always go without big changes.  

The first thing is the thing that takes a number that goes in and gives the number times itself. It goes without big changes at every point on the line of true numbers. It works everywhere; for every line of numbers that gets closer to a given point, the new line of numbers also gets closer to the number times itself of that point; and it turns sets of numbers that stay not too big into sets of numbers that also stay not too big.  

The second thing is the thing that takes a number that goes in and gives a number that gets bigger fast when the number that goes in gets bigger. It goes without big changes at every point. It works everywhere; it keeps the idea that when a line of numbers gets closer to a point, the new line also gets closer; and it turns sets of numbers that stay not too big into sets of numbers that also stay not too big.  

The third thing is the thing that takes a number that goes in and gives a number that goes up and down in the same way. It goes without big changes at every point. It works everywhere; it keeps the idea that when a line of numbers gets closer to a point, the new line also gets closer; and it itself stays not too big, so it also turns sets of numbers that stay not too big into sets of numbers that stay not too big.  

From these cases we can make a thought: a thing that changes a number into another number is without big changes at a point if and only if it works there, it keeps the idea that when a line of numbers gets closer to that point the new line also gets closer, and it turns sets of numbers that stay not too big into sets of numbers that stay not too big in every small area around the point.  

The first two thoughts are the well known way of saying without big changes with lines of numbers, which is the same as the usual small number thought and everyone says it is right.  

The third thought – that the thing turns sets of numbers that stay not too big into sets of numbers that stay not too big in small areas around the point – is true for all three case things and might look like a different needed thought. Yet it is not different. It comes from the line thought. If a thing keeps the idea that every line of numbers that gets closer to a point also gets closer after the thing, then it stays not too big in every small area around that point, and so it turns sets of numbers that stay not too big in that area into sets of numbers that stay not too big. The third thought adds no new thought that is already in the second. The case things were all good things that showed many nice things beyond just being without big changes, and the thought has taken one such nice thing – staying not too big – and raised it up as a different thought, when in truth it follows from the line thought as a clear end. The look at this has taken true words about without big changes things for a different thought, making the thought look more strong without adding any real new thought.

question: counterexample to: A division of history into periods is legitimate if and only if (i) each period
expected_answer:
One might say that a real way to cut time into parts shows each time by things that are the same and also things that are different, makes lines at big changes, and can be used for the whole area we look at. This picture shows that the parts fit together inside and can be used outside, like good ways to cut time into parts do.  

But one case that shows this not enough can come from the story of the west. The usual cut between the old time and the new time puts the line at about the year 1400. In the towns in the west, this line shows real changes: the new start of old school learning, the coming of new art ways, the growing of buying and selling and money making. This way to cut time into parts meets all three parts when used for the towns in the west.  

But in the north lands, the ways people live, the ways money works, and the ways they make art that belong to the old time kept going far into the year 1500. The line at year 1400, even if it shows a big change in one area, tells a wrong story about how things change in another area.  

One can see that the idea, by saying it only has to work for the whole area and not saying it must fit the different times of change in each part, lets a plan made for one place be used on places where it does not fit the time.

expected_answer:
One might say an always true thing is a thing that is true in all possible times, its truth can be shown by looking at its way the words are put together alone, and that can be said using only the usual words that make true by the way the words are put together.  

This meaning fits the first set of always true things — the first thing or not the first thing, and if the first thing and the second thing then the first thing — with very clear words.  

These things are true no matter what the first thing and the second thing are, and their truth can be seen from their way the words are put together.  

But one case that shows the not enough of this look is given by things whose must be true comes not from the way the words are put together but from the meaning of their words.  

The thing “If something is the first kind then it has a look” is true in every possible time: nothing can be the first kind and not have a look.  

Its truth is as sure as any other always true thing that is true by the way the words are put together.  

But it cannot be shown to be true by looking at its way the words are put together, because its way — “If something is the first thing then something is the second thing” — is not an always true thing that is true by the way the words are put together (there are many things of this set that are not true).  

Its must be true rests on the meaning that go together between the first kind and the look, a meaning that the look at the way the words are put together cannot get.  

One might see that the meaning has been made to fit the things we use for thinking about these things and leaves out must be true things that need the form of the words or on meaning that go together between words — an end that shows the ends of a certain set of ways rather than the ends of the idea of an always true thing.

question: counterexample to: A substance S is a chemical element if and only if (i) S is composed of atoms al
expected_answer:
Think about three things that we call a kind of single part thing.  

All the tiny parts of the first thing are the same kind and there are no other things together. It is soft, yellow, metal, does not get wear away easily, it is made only of tiny parts that all have the number 79, and it has a set point where it turns to a hot soft form, a way it is heavy for its size, and a way it likes to change with other things that make it different from any other thing.  

All the tiny parts of the second thing are the same kind and there are no other things together. It is hard, dark, metal, it is made of tiny parts that all have the number 26, and it also has its own set of things it does.  

All the tiny parts of the third thing are the same kind and there are no other things together. It is an air like thing with no color and no smell that is needed for breathing, it is made of tiny parts that all have the number 8.  

Each thing is made of tiny parts of one kind, has its own set of things it does, and is all the same way all over when we see it in the usual way.  

We could write a thought: a thing is a single part thing if it is made of tiny parts that all have the same number, it has its own set of things it does, and it is all the same way all over when we see it in the usual way.  

Now think about the thing with the number 6. Any person who study things would call it a single part thing. Yet the thing does not have just one set of things it does.  

The hard clear form of the thing with number 6 – tiny parts put together so each tiny part is put together with four others in a shape that goes in three ways – is the hardest thing we know, clear, very bright, and it does not let force move, and it needs a very high hot point where it turns to a hot soft form.  

The soft dark form of the thing with number 6 – tiny parts put together in flat sheets that look like many little flat pieces – is one of the softest hard things we know, not clear, dark, and so good at letting force move that we use it in pieces that help move force.  

The two forms have different ways they are heavy for their size, different ways the tiny parts are put together, different ways they look with light, and different ways they let force move.  

When we look at them with our eyes, they are as different as two things can be.  

In the usual way we see it, the thing with number 6 is not all the same way all over; it can be the hard clear form or it can be the soft dark form, and both are okay to call it the thing with number 6.  

The second and third parts of the thought are not true.  

The earlier cases were things that happen to be only one usual form – one form of the thing with number 79, one form of the thing with number 26, one form of the thing with number 8 – and the thought took this same as needed.  

The thing with number 6 shows that what makes a thing a single part thing is not the way it looks or acts on a big size but the fact that its tiny parts are the same, and that one single part thing can look very different on how its tiny parts are put together.

question: counterexample to: A moment T is in the past if and only if (i) T has occurred — that is, the event
expected_answer: Someone could say that a time is in the past only when it has happened, it is not now, and it is kept in the memory of at least one mind that felt it. That idea has a kind of easy feeling. When we think about things that happened before — a day when we were small and had food, a walk in the morning on a day before, a paper that people signed — we think about things that have happened, that are not happening now, and that are kept in the memory of the people who saw them. Memory looks like the way the past stays alive; without it, someone could think the past would be nothing — just an empty space where something used to be. But we must think about how the earth was made. That thing happened many many years ago, far before any mind was there. Hot rock came together from a cloud of dust and air; the outside got cold; the first hard outside part became hard over many years. These things have happened and are not now. They are, by any good story, in the past. But no mind saw them; no memory keeps them. We guess they happened from the rock story — from what rocks are made of, from the way rock parts change over time, from space rocks — but this guess is not memory. Memory needs a mind that was there at the thing and that keeps a thought of it, and there was no mind like that when the earth was made. The third part of that idea does not work. The idea has joined together the way we most often understand the past — memory — with what makes something past. A time does not need a person who saw it to have happened and to be not now; the past goes far beyond what any mind can touch, and most of what has happened happened without any mind to see it.

question: counterexample to: An act of naming succeeds in assigning a name N to an object O if and only if (i
expected_answer:
The acts of naming that we most easy see as good share a shape that simple talks often miss.  

When parents give a child a name at a baby naming day, the good of the naming needs not only the saying of a word that tries to point to the child, but also the people group and ideas that run the thing where the saying happens — a special day where people gather, a paper that writes down when a baby is born, people seeing the name.  

When a person who studies green things gives a new kind of green thing a two word name, the name works because it follows the set of ideas that tell what to do, the world wide set of name ideas, which gives power and makes it stay on the name.  

When a country gives a big bridge a name at a special day where people gather to give a name, the good needs the power given to the person who does the naming and the people group and ideas that run the work of many people.  

One may try to say this by calling good naming a saying made with the trying to point, with the thing being seen, by a person who says and knows about giving names.  

Yet a case that shows this idea is not enough can be taken from child play.  

Suppose a child, alone in a garden, picks up a different stone and says very serious, “I name you the name we will call the stone.”  

The child says the name with real trying to point.  

The child holds the stone and is seeing it.  

The child knows what giving a name is, because they have watched baby naming days and giving names to animals that live with people.  

Every part is met.  

Yet if no other person ever learns of or knows this name, the name has no good for other people, no power to make people follow, and does not stay beyond the child own mind.  

One can see that what the other cases share – and what the short saying does not need – is that the act of giving a name be put inside or accepted by a known people group and ideas that run the thing, so that the name has power to make people follow and can be shared, known, and kept by other people.

question: counterexample to: An account A constitutes a satisfactory historical explanation of an event E if
expected_answer:
The best clear stories about the past all have a big part that we can look at. When the first writer told about the big war in an old place, he said there was a big reason — the rise of a city and the fear it made — and also the small reasons that started the fighting. When the writer who told about a big change in 1789 told the story, he put the things that happened in 1789 inside a long change of the people there, but he did not say they were only a simple idea. When the writer who told about the fall of a sea area told the story, he put together the edges of the land, the ways money moved, and the small things run by the people who run the place over many times. In each story, the telling worked because it put together the big picture and the small picture — by showing how big reasons made the small things happen but did not decide all.

Someone could try to make a simple idea for a good story about the past by saying it must name the things that had to be there first, put the thing inside a big way, and fit what the old papers say. But a story about the fall of a big city in 1453 shows that this simple idea is not enough. We can name the things that had to be there — the old group of people who fight got less strong, a new group got bigger, and help from the west did not come — and we can put the fall inside the big way that big groups whose groups of people who fight get less strong while a close group gets bigger can be taken over. The story fits all the old papers. All three things are there. But the story does not tell why the fall happened in the way it did: the leader used many big things that can hurt that had never been used before, a lucky find of a door that was left open, and small choices of the people who tried to keep safe. These small things were needed for how the fall really was. Someone can see that other stories show, and the simple idea does not get, that a story about the past must put together the big picture and the small picture, by putting big form reasons to the small things that make each past event have its own shape.

expected_answer:

question: counterexample to: A system of classification C is scientifically adequate if and only if (i) C gro
expected_answer:
The best ways that people have put things into groups — a set of many small parts that are put in order by the way their inside parts are built, a way that a well known old person put living things into groups by the way their bodies look, a way that people put rocks into groups by the way their tiny parts are built — all have a same good point.  

Each one puts things together by parts about them that you cannot just see on the outside but that are part of the thing itself and that make other parts about the thing that people who study care about.  

The first set puts many small parts together by parts that come from the way their inside parts are built; the second way puts living things together by the way their bodies look, which shows they share a same family; the rock way uses the way the tiny parts are built, which decides how hard they are, how they break, and how they let light go through.  

From these big case we can try to make a way to put things into groups that is good for study only when it puts together things that share big important parts, when the groups stay the same when we see new things, and when the whole way fits with the best ideas we have.  

But this way, even though it works for the big case, also lets in ways to put things together that are not good for study.  

Think about a way to put stars into groups by how bright they look from our world — how much light we see.  

Stars that look about the same bright share a part that matters when we look at them; new stars we find can be given a bright look number without changing the groups; and this way of grouping fits well with the ideas we have about space, because the bright look number is a clear thing we can see.  

All three parts of the way are true.  

But this way of grouping does not tell us much about the stars, because it puts together stars that are really very different — a small close star that is not bright and a huge far star that is very bright can look the same bright — and it puts together stars that are really the same.  

The part we use to make the groups — how bright they look — is about where we are looking from, not about any real part of the stars.  

The big case worked because it used parts that belong to the things themselves, not because of where we look at them.  

The way says the parts we group by must be important, but it does not say they must be parts that belong to the things themselves and not to the way we see them.

expected_answer:
One might think that a group of numbers that you can add and see which is bigger in order is whole if and only if it has the idea that you can always find a whole number bigger than any number, it has all the numbers that can be written as one whole number over another whole number inside it, and every number in the group can be written as one whole number over another whole number.  

The first two ideas make sense: the real numbers have the idea that you can always find a whole number bigger than any number, and they do have all the numbers that can be written as one whole number over another whole number inside them.  

The third idea might seem to make sense if what you know about these groups of numbers is only the ones that can be written as one whole number over another whole number. Every such number is, by the words that say what it is, a part of one whole number over another whole number, and that group of numbers follows all three ideas.  

Yet one must think about the real numbers – the group that most people think of as the main whole group of numbers. The real numbers have the idea that you can always find a whole number bigger than any number: for any number there is a whole number that is bigger. They have all the numbers that can be written as one whole number over another whole number.  

But not every real number is a part of one whole number over another whole number. The number that when you put it together with itself gives the number 2 is not a part of whole numbers, a fact that people have shown a long time ago and is one of the first and biggest things people have found in numbers. It cannot be written as one whole number over another whole number, no matter how in a good way you try to pick the top and bottom whole numbers.  

The third idea of the words that say what it is does not work for the real numbers.  

But the real numbers are whole; in fact, having the idea that any group of real numbers that has at least one number and has a biggest number also has a smallest biggest number inside the group is what makes them whole.  

The words that say what the numbers are only talked about the numbers that can be written as one whole number over another whole number, not about the idea that makes a group whole, and so they put together groups that do not have the idea with groups that do.

expected_answer:
Think about three things where trust is simple. A man gives money to his neighbor, trusting the money will be paid back. His trust comes from knowing each other; he has known the neighbor for many years, has seen him when they work together, and has found him always on time with what he must do. A person who sells things lets a long time buyer take things now, trusting the buyer is good, which he has had many chances to see over many years of buying and selling. A person who grows food puts his work things in an open small building, trusting that his neighbors — men he has known since he was a child — will take care of his things. From these things you could make a simple saying: a person trusts another if and only if they know each other by meeting many times, the first has seen the second act in a good way before, and the trust goes both ways.

But we also need to think about the trust that a person who rides in a big flying thing puts in the person who flies the big flying thing. The person who rides comes to the place where big flying things start, shows his paper that lets him go, walks through the door where people get on, sits down, puts the thing that holds his pants on, and gives his life — with no worry and no fear — to the person who will fly the big flying thing. Yet the person who rides has never met the person who flies. He does not know the name of the person who flies, has no knowing of the ways of the person who flies, and has never seen the person who flies do any act, good or bad. His trust does not come from knowing a person or seeing before; it comes from something else — from the things that tell how to act for people who fly big things, from the fact that the person who flies has been taught, looked at, and given the yes by a group that makes the things that tell how to act, from the fact that the big flying thing has been looked at and said good, and from the fact that the group that runs the trips must follow the things that tell how to act for being safe made by law. The trust does not go both ways in any real way; the person who flies does not give the safe of the person who rides, and the way they are joined is not the same for both. All three parts of the simple saying do not hold. Yet the trust is real and very strong — as strong as any trust between neighbors, because it is a trust where the life of the person is in a chance of a bad thing.

The earlier things were taken from places where people meet each other, where trust is about a person, seen by watching, and goes both ways, and the simple saying took these parts as important. The big flying thing shows that the trust that holds up new life together is mostly not about a person, is made by groups, and is one way, and it does not rest on knowing the ways of a person but on the good work of many parts, looks, and the things that tell how to act that the person who trusts may never have looked at and could not decide.

expected_answer:
Think about three places that are like cases of a space. The inside of a room is a space: it has walls, a floor, and a top; it can hold things – a table, a chair, a light; and you can say where any thing is inside it by looking at the walls and the corners. A field is a space: it has side lines and end lines; people who play and a ball move inside it; and you can say where they are by using numbers that you count from the side lines. The inside of a box is a space: it has six sides; you can put things inside it; and you can give a place for a thing by using three directions. From these cases you can make a simple thought: a place is a space only when it has walls or sides, it can hold things, and you can tell where things are by using numbers.

But you also have to think about the open air above a flat sand. A person who flies a big flying thing starts from a small flat ground and goes to the west over a big flat sand that goes to the side all around. Above him the air goes up – light blue, then dark blue, then black high air. He is in a space; people would say it is. He moves in the space, changes where he is in it, and where he is can be said – by numbers that tell where – with as much close as the place of a chair in a room. Things are in this space: birds fly in it, clouds move in it, the big flying thing makes a line in it. Yet this space has no walls. There are no walls, no sides, no lines that mark an end. The sand goes to the side all around, and the air goes up with no top or wall to mark its end. You can not point to a wall and say “here the space ends.” The first part does not work. The first cases were all made by people with walls – rooms, fields, boxes – with clear walls, and the thought said walls are needed for a space. The open air shows that a place can be a space in the most full way – it can hold things, let things move, and you can tell where things are by numbers – even if it has no walls at all. The thought got the parts wrong.

question: counterexample to: A political entity E is sovereign if and only if (i) E exercises supreme authori
expected_answer:
Someone could say that a group that makes laws for a place is the top group only if it has the final say inside a set land, keeps control of the use of force inside that land, and is said to be the top group by other groups that are also top.  

The first part shows the inside side of being the top: inside its land, the word of the top group is final.  

The second part makes sure that the top group has the ways to make its word be followed.  

The third part adds an outside side: being the top is not just an inside thing but also needs people in many places to say it is true.  

All together, the parts show a group that makes laws for a place that is the most inside, can keep safe itself, and is said to be the top by people outside.  

But someone could see that the part about people saying it is the top brings a strange circle and a hard outside side.  

Think about the place that many people talk about.  

That place has a working group that makes laws and has the final say inside its land.  

It has a group of soldiers and a group of people who keep order that keep control of the use of force inside its edges.  

It makes its own outside plan, makes its own money, and runs its own laws.  

By the first and second parts, that place looks like it is the top.  

But many other places do not say it is the top, mostly because they want to stay nice with the big country that says it owns the land.  

If the law is used exactly, that place is not the top — not because it does not have any real part of being the top, but because some outside groups think it is easier to say it is not.  

The law, it seems, has put the idea of being the top in part in the hands of outside people whose thoughts may show a hard choice instead of any look at how the group really works.

question: counterexample to: Two sets A and B have the same cardinality if and only if (i) there exists a fun
expected_answer:
In small cases that we use to think about size, the fact that we can make a one to one pair between two groups is the same as the thought that not the first or the second group is a part that is not the whole of the other.  

When we put together five red foods with five foods that are a different color, we see not only that a pair is there but also that not the first or the second group has the other inside it.  

When we take paper pieces from two piles at the same time and use up both piles, what happens fits the simple idea that a whole is always bigger than any part that is not the whole.  

This idea asks us to make a big idea: two groups have the same size when we can pair each thing in one group with one thing in the other group.  

But a case that shows this idea is not enough comes from groups that have no end.  

Think about the numbers we use to count and the numbers that are two times bigger. The idea that changes each counting number to the number that is two times bigger is clearly a pair – each thing in the first group goes to a different thing in the second group, and every thing in the second group gets a thing from the first. By this idea, the two groups have the same size.  

Yet the numbers that are two times bigger are a part that is not the whole of the counting numbers: every number that is two times bigger is a counting number, but not every counting number is two times bigger. The idea then says the part has the same size as the whole – a thought that would be not right in a small case.  

One can see that what the small cases have in shared, and what the no end case breaks, is the idea that same size works together with the idea that a part is not as big as the whole. The idea, by not thinking about this idea and using only the pair, moves the idea of same size into a place where it gives what happens that, even if good for counting, do not fit the thoughts we first had.

question: indicative conditional, constructive_dilemma — statutory
expected_answer:
Ending a company needs careful steps of giving out the things the company owns to keep safe both the owners, who get what is left, and the people who gave money to the company, who get first right to the things the company owns.

The law in most places makes a set of steps for ending a company that tell how the people who run the company must act about who gets first right.

The first if case talks about the case that makes the people who run the company have to pay: if a company ends and gives out its things to owners before paying the people who gave money, the people who said yes to the give out are to pay the people who gave money.

This hard case is hard in the way that it does not need the people who run the company to know the right number of money that need to be paid; the must to pay the people who gave money before giving out to owners is a simple step about being good and putting others first that the people who run the company are thought to know.

The second if case talks about the case that keeps the people who run the company from having to pay: if a company that is ending tells all the people who gave money that the company knows about and keeps enough things kept away from the things given out before giving out the rest of the things to owners, the people who run the company are not by themselves having to pay for those gives.

The telling and keeping steps let the people who run the company give out things in ending while keeping safe against later money asks, if they did the law steps with good care.

The company we talk about, a small made things company, was ending its work after 60 years of being a business.

The people who ran it had the real question of if the ending steps they had used gave enough safe.

The hard choice makes the question: either the company we talk about gave out without paying the people who gave money, making the people who run it have to pay, or it did the right telling and keeping steps, taking away the need to pay.

The hard choice does not settle the real fight, but it shows what the group that decides must decide to see if the people who gave money can hold the people who run the company to pay.

The look comes from three simple things that all have the same shape: the things that tell how things work are the same when you change something; a thing we can change – heat, pull, weight – goes past an important point; the thing then has two low ways it could be, both the same in how they work; and the thing by itself chooses one of those ways, ending up in a look that is less the same than the things that tell how it works.  

The main thought the look puts is that a thing that is the same can make something not the same even if nothing not the same was put in a way that is not seen at the start or in how it moves: the not the same comes from the choice itself, not from breaking the deep same.

The getting colder of the early all we can see, as it changes from one step to another, acts like the thing we can change that goes past an important point. The two possible all that could be, one with more one kind of things and one with more the different kind of things, act like the two low ways. And the real all we live in, which has more one kind of things, is the thing that the thing chose by itself – it is less the same than the things that made it, but it still fits with the things being the same at the start.

question: probabilistic conditional, modus_ponens — child_rearing
expected_answer:
There is a kind of change that many people see that often works in how young people who read move through the steps of books for kids, and it is good to see it not as a tall thing that kids climb at set ages but as a step by step change that comes from the more they have read as well as how old they are.  

The kid who has been reading by them for two or more years — reading by choice, reading for fun, reading long enough times to really finish books and come back for more — makes a strong want for story that the first short books stop making happy.  

First short books are made to help new readers who read by them: short parts, few people, easy to guess story lines, things that end fast.  

For a kid with two years of reading by them behind them, those parts stop being help and start feeling slow. The story line is too easy, the parts too short, the end too sure too fast.  

What they want — what they are ready for — is a story line that needs them to keep things in mind over many parts, people who have inside thoughts that make the story more hard, problems that need a real path to end.  

That is the place that books for older kids fill.  

Our boy has been reading by himself since six, taking books and finishing them and asking for the next one, and he is now eight. Two whole years of easy reading by himself for fun.  

The same idea works for him. He will probably have already grown out of the first short books now, even if we keep getting them, and he will probably like more the kind of story and people that books for older kids with doing or make believe give.  

We should change our book place choices in that way.
